positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized celestial forest scene. Giant bioluminescent flora with intricate vein patterns are rooted in a misty, twilight landscape. The main focus is a winding path leading to an ethereal, glowing crescent moon visible through overlapping geometric constellations. Color palette uses deep indigo, vibrant teal, neon magenta, and glowing gold accents. Strong silhouettes are emphasized against the dark background. Art style is highly detailed digital illustration, blending Art Nouveau flowing lines with cosmic Sci-Fi elements. Composition must be central and balanced, optimized for repeating print placement, high contrast for apparel printing. Cinematic volumetric lighting, octane render, 8k quality.
negative: blurry, out of focus, grain, low quality, amateur, worst quality, artifacts, text, signature, logo, watermark, noise, bad anatomy, mutated limbs, extra fingers, distorted
